fields.description: Show the "Sarankan balasan" (AI suggest) button in the composer. AI only drafts a reply — the agent always reviews and sends manually. No auto-send.
fields.label: Enable AI Assist

fields.description: Base URL for the provider. For Ollama this is the local server (e.g. http://localhost:11434). For Claude/OpenAI leave blank to use the default API endpoint.
fields.label: Endpoint

fields.description: Model name, e.g. llama3.1:8b (Ollama), claude-opus-4-8 (Claude), gpt-4o (OpenAI).
fields.label: Model

fields.description: API key for cloud providers (Claude / OpenAI). Not needed for local Ollama.
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: Optional instructions to steer the AI's tone and style (language, formality, brand voice).
fields.label: System Prompt
